keypad_initialize.message0: Initialize keyboard Row pins R1 %1 R2 %2 R3 %3 R4 %4 Column pins C1 %5 C2 %6 C3 %7 C4 %8
keypad_initialize.tooltip: Initialize the keyboard matrix, you need to specify 4 row pins and 4 column pins

keypad_getkey.tooltip: Returns the currently pressed key, or null if no key is pressed.
